td.style: width:10%; border-left:1px solid black;border-right:1px solid black;min-height: 10px !important;max-height: 10px !important;
width:10%; border-left:1px solid black;border-right:1px solid black;min-height: 10px !important;max-height: 10px !important;
width:50%; border-left:1px solid black;border-right:1px solid black;min-height: 10px !important;max-height: 10px !important;
width:10%; border-left:1px solid black;border-right:1px solid black;min-height: 10px !important;max-height: 10px !important;

t.t-foreach: o.budget_id.concept_ids.filtered(lambda x: x.type == 'departure' and x.parent_id == chapter)
